title: A Caution.
content:
That love last long, let it thy first care be
    To find a wife that is most fit for thee.
    Be she too wealthy or too poor, be sure
    Love in extremes can never long endure.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "A Caution.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
